stimulus: The release in 2007 of the first modern smartphone fundamentally changed the mobile communications industry. In fact, some analysts argue that the device essentially ______blank the industry by giving consumers a single handheld device for telephony, internet access, and software applications all at once.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice B is the best answer because "reinvented" means thoroughly changed in form or function, matching the description of the device combining several capabilities at once. Choice A is incorrect because "discouraged" suggests deterring development; the text describes positive, transformative change. Choice C is incorrect because "copied" means imitated; the device was a novel combination, not a copy. Choice D is incorrect because "distanced" means moved away from; the device acted on the industry rather than withdrawing from it.
